rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal; Beirut/Iran situation continues as background energy risk but no qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue, Iran deal unresolved
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East tensions maintain a low-level risk of energy price spikes affecting Portuguese households, but no new escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: UK-Japan £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: Major UK-Japan trade deal has negligible direct impact on Portugal; minor signal of shifting global trade patterns post-Brexit.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns injuring 17 at Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: Incident at a Spanish festival is geographically close but a minor local accident with no broader impact on Portugal's tourism economy.
